name: Final Growth Readiness Classification And Board Wrap-Up

decision.summary: Mitra Auto has stronger local source contracts, product/commerce checks, content safety checks, and monitoring handoff than at board start, but production and platform evidence still fail or remain unavailable. No paid acquisition, broad SEO content scaling, local/product growth campaigns, or experiments should start until the blocking launch and measurement gates pass.

classification.evidence: Local gates passed for build, i18n, content claims, static assets, sitemap, feed, route migration, private routes, checkout, and commerce. Figma Make preview smoke and branch/runtime sync remain blocked.
classification.blockingReason: Figma Make preview URL was unavailable, four Figma Make service files still carry public [TBD] placeholders, and origin/main versus implementation branch policy remains unresolved.

classification.evidence: E-2 and E-4 live HTTP matrices show production raw routes still serve a generic SPA shell, critical static SEO assets are missing or HTML, redirects are inactive, private/error routes return public 200 shell responses, and raw route-specific canonical/schema is missing.
classification.blockingReason: Gate D launch-ready requires production robots/sitemap/redirect/host checks, correct status policy, and no unresolved blockers.

classification.evidence: Local commerce/feed/product contract checks pass and rendered product/cart/checkout smoke works without destructive submission.
classification.blockingReason: Live product sitemap and Merchant feed parity fail, opaque product identifier redirects are inactive, Merchant Center diagnostics are unavailable, and provider/payment readback remains incomplete.

classification.evidence: Local source removes internal governance text and claim checks pass, but Figma Make placeholders, GBP/citation facts, service proof, reviews/ratings/media/legal/privacy evidence, and business owner approvals remain unavailable.
classification.blockingReason: Growth-ready local/service SEO requires current owner-approved business facts and proof-sensitive claims, not only local source cleanup.

classification.evidence: Rendered homepage, DPF booking, contact, catalog, product, cart, and checkout journeys work at desktop size, but E-3 found unnamed controls, unlabeled checkout checkboxes, weak catalog labels, product gallery control issues, and no mobile viewport evidence.
classification.blockingReason: Gate D requires representative browser and mobile tasks; Gate E requires customer journeys that are operable and measurable.

classification.evidence: Event dictionary and reconciliation contracts are improved, but Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, GA4/analytics, logs, field Core Web Vitals, booking/order/revenue reconciliation, consent/legal approval, and owner evidence remain unavailable.
classification.blockingReason: Gate E growth-ready requires stable measurement, qualified outcomes, monitoring, and operational capacity.

classification.evidence: E-4 created a current failing production baseline, owner map, monitoring cadence, incident runbook, rollback path, communication path, and next-review triggers.
classification.blockingReason: Monitoring artifacts exist, but platform alert/readback integrations are unavailable and production currently fails the monitored baseline.

blockers.rootCause: Production deploy/runtime parity is not proven and live HTTP still serves stale Figma/SPAshell behavior.
blockers.verification: Deploy repo build plus Pages Functions to canonical production; rerun live HTTP matrix and browser smoke.

blockers.rootCause: robots.txt and sitemap.xml return 404; product sitemap and Merchant feed return HTML on production.
blockers.verification: Public URLs return correct status, content type, and body; Search Console/Merchant Center fetch readbacks pass.

blockers.rootCause: Private/admin/account and unknown routes return public 200 shell responses at the HTTP layer.
blockers.verification: Unauthenticated private routes return safe 401/403/404/noindex policy; unknown routes/products return real 404/410.

blockers.rootCause: Legacy service/catalog routes and opaque product identifier URLs do not redirect server-side to canonical destinations in production.
blockers.verification: Legacy paths and product UUID/GTIN/SKU samples return one-hop permanent redirects to canonical slugs.

blockers.rootCause: Cloudflare, Search Console, Google Business Profile, Merchant Center, GA4/analytics, logs, field CWV, and owner evidence are unavailable.
blockers.verification: Least-privilege authenticated readbacks record account/property IDs, diagnostics, submitted assets, alerts, and limitations.

blockers.rootCause: Accessibility and SXO defects remain in shared header, checkout, catalog, product media controls, and mobile evidence.
blockers.verification: Desktop and mobile rendered journey audits show clear labels, focus, accessible names, field states, and safe high-impact actions.

blockers.rootCause: Owner proof is unavailable for local facts, citations, GBP, claims, reviews/ratings, media, warranty/liability/policies, and service/product evidence.
blockers.verification: Owner-approved evidence package is current and public copy/schema/feed/profile facts reconcile.

blockers.rootCause: Figma Make preview smoke is unavailable and pushed Figma Make source still has four public [TBD] service placeholders.
blockers.verification: Patch exact Figma Make files, push/sync, and run preview browser/console smoke.

priorityRemediationOrder: Fix production host/deployment parity so Cloudflare Pages serves this repo build, static SEO assets, Functions route policy, redirects, and real error/private statuses.
Verify raw HTML or edge-injected metadata/schema for homepage, service, local, catalog, product, checkout utility, private, and error route samples.
Patch Figma Make public [TBD] service placeholders and run preview smoke.
Fix accessibility/SXO defects in shared header, checkout controls, catalog labels/buttons, product gallery controls, and mobile journey evidence.
Complete authenticated readbacks for Cloudflare, Supabase/Paytrail, Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, GA4/analytics, logs, and field CWV.
Complete owner evidence for local facts, services, product policies, reviews/ratings, media, legal/privacy, warranty/liability, and claims.
Rerun E-2 through E-4 live, browser, platform, and drift checks after fixes.
Only after Gate D and Gate E pass, start guide/content expansion, paid acquisition, product/local SEO scaling, or experiments.

verification.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['.growth-work/release/e1-figma-make-preview-verification-patch-state-ledger-2026-06-23.json','.growth-work/release/e2-production-crawl-rendered-head-schema-browser-matrix-2026-06-23.json','.growth-work/release/e3-accessibility-sxo-checkout-customer-journey-smoke-2026-06-23.json','.seo-work/crawl/e4-drift-baseline-2026-06-23.json','.growth-work/release/e4-drift-baseline-monitoring-incident-runbook-owners-2026-06-23.json','.growth-work/measurement/phase-d-platform-owner-evidence-measurement-wrapup-2026-06-23.json']; for (const f of files) { JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8')); console.log(f+' ok'); }"

noGuarantee: This board improves implementation quality, evidence discipline, and remediation focus. It does not guarantee crawling, indexing, selected canonicals, rankings, rich results, local-pack visibility, Merchant Center approval, traffic, conversions, revenue, ROI, or AI inclusion.
next: Remediation board or implementation pass for production parity blockers before rerunning release/growth readiness.
